things.name: National Museum of Afghanistan
things.description: Partially restored museum with Gandharan Buddhist art and Bactrian Gold artefacts

things.name: Babur's Gardens (Bagh-e Babur)
things.description: 16th-century Mughal gardens laid out by the emperor Babur - his final resting place

things.name: Kabul Old Bazaar (Mandawi)
things.description: Historic bazaar district with copper merchants, spice sellers and money changers

things.name: Darul Aman Palace
things.description: Dramatic ruined 1920s palace - a symbol of Afghanistan's turbulent 20th century

things.name: Pul-e Khishti Mosque
things.description: Blue-domed 18th-century mosque - Kabul's largest place of worship

things.name: Chicken Street
things.description: Famous street of antique shops, carpet sellers and lapis lazuli jewellers

things.name: Band-e Amir National Park
things.description: Six cobalt-blue crater lakes in the Hindu Kush - Afghanistan's first national park

things.name: Minaret of Jam (UNESCO)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 65m Ghurid minaret from 1194 in a remote mountain gorge

things.name: Bamiyan Valley
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage valley where the giant Buddhas stood before destruction - still breathtaking

things.name: Qabili Palau (Lamb Rice)
things.description: Afghanistan's national dish - steamed rice with carrots, raisins and slow-braised lamb
